raw_consumer_statement:
Hi, Im filing a complain about a fraudulent charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX purchase XXXX that is still unresolved. My statement is due tomorrow, and I will not be paying interest on a charge that is under dispute. Total charge as of XX/XX/year> is XXXX. My credit score now drops.
